title: Mandatory Returns and Unroutable Publication · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible a correlated Go return and route-evidence ledger with one stale generation, blocked notification, goroutine leak, acknowledgement, route, or effect defect; locate cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a correlated Go return and route-evidence ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Register and drain return notifications before mandatory publication and correlate content, exchange, routing key, properties, and publisher intent.
Distinguish broker confirms from consumer processing and combine mandatory returns or alternate routing with confirm results; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Build topology fixtures that assert expected destination sets, forbidden routes, unroutable cases, permissions, and changed bindings; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Mandatory Return Sequence
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go messaging team handles case 6457 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to keep return, alternate custody, confirmation, and unknown route evidence separate; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then fail the canary and prove older Go consumers remain compatible. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Register and drain return notifications before mandatory publication and correlate content, exchange, routing key, properties, and publisher intent.

Inspect the Mandatory Return Sequence trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Mandatory Return Sequence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Alternate Return Tradeoff
steps.instruction:
Append a compile-ready pure-Go function headed "// Evidence: rabbit-go-alternate-return-tradeoff-xupdgj" that uses case 2935 to keep return, alternate custody, confirmation, and unknown route evidence separate. Return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import amqp091-go, open sockets, contact RabbitMQ, Docker, networks, databases, or external effects, read host state, execute host commands, or use credentials; verify those boundaries later with Go 1.26.5 compile, vet, race, fuzz, leak, amqp091-go 1.12.0, RabbitMQ 4.3, TLS, partition, restart, load, upgrade, and production gates.
